name: Hot German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender.
2. Drain, peel, and while hot, cut into 1/8 inch slices.
3. Sprinkle with the salt, pepper, mustard, sugar, and flour.
4. Heat water and vinegar to boiling point.
5. Place bacon, sliced and chopped fine in skillet, fry light brown.
6. Add onions, brown slightly; add potatoes and the hot vinegar.
7. Heat through to absorb the vinegar and water.
8. Serve warm.
